author: codex-agent

patch.value: Track findings from the full manual sandbox dogfood audit and drive follow-up remediations for CLI reliability, UX clarity, and extensibility.
All high-impact dogfood findings are documented, linked, and either fixed or queued with clear ownership and verification evidence.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm context --limit 10; pm search '2026-04-25 dogfood audit update-many status option' --mode keyword --limit 10; pm list-open --limit 20; pm list-in-progress --limit 20; pm list-blocked --limit 20. Net-new scope because no active/open item tracks this full sandbox dogfood wave.

message: Create feature for 2026-04-25 full dogfood audit findings

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Execution evidence (2026-04-25): completed full sandbox dogfood pass covering bootstrap, lifecycle CRUD, ownership, annotations, query/search/context/calendar/aggregate/activity/history/stats/comments-audit, linked-test orchestration (schema/auto context + background stop/resume), governance (health/validate/gc/contracts/completion), extension lifecycle + beads/todos import/export, and help/discoverability loops.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Key findings captured: LanceDB dimension mismatch blocks default search in real tracker; update-many help advertises unsupported --status; config strict policy ergonomics around strict_error/clear semantics need clarification; --add structured payload ergonomics in comment/note/learning flows can be ambiguous without explicit examples.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Dogfood in isolated PM_PATH sandboxes catches command-contract drift quickly, but real-tracker validation is still required to surface vector-store/index compatibility regressions.

author: codex-agent
message: Link related active features for overlapping dogfood findings

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Progress update: closed child findings pm-3cx8 (update-many --status mismatch) and pm-oyt8 (LanceDB dimension mismatch search failure) with linked code/test evidence. Remaining active scope: pm-9ayo (config strict policy ergonomics) and pm-odcr (evidence consolidation + project management sweep).

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Final wave status: child findings pm-oyt8, pm-3cx8, pm-9ayo, and pm-odcr are closed. Verification evidence includes targeted unit suites for vector-store/config/update-many fixes plus linked coverage run (76 files/1038 tests passed). Best-practice sweep now reports tracked-all validation clean, dedupe-open clean, and overdue open/in-progress deadline queries at zero.

author: codex-agent
